findings.text: NAP-SRC-0005 is a Guarantor Form from Edinburgh Napier University with student name Antal Elbushra, number 40805511, allocated accommodation G51 4JZ.
NAP-SRC-0007 is a payment confirmation email from Edinburgh Napier University (Ref: ENU447436) for a £30.00 credit/debit card payment.
NAP-SRC-0005 extracted text has garbled characters, missing line breaks, and merged words (e.g., 'Fo rm', 'BINDIN G', 'th em of th st nd rd 7 e debt ~mount').
NAP-SRC-0007 OCR has low confidence (0.65) and may miss text; card reference and authorisation number are redacted or missing.

proposed_artifacts.content:
## OCR Improvement Report

### NAP-SRC-0005 (Granter Agreement.pdf)
- **Current extraction**: pdf_text (pdftotext), confidence 0.85
- **Issues**: Garbled characters, missing line breaks, merged words (e.g., 'Fo rm', 'BINDIN G', 'th em of th st nd rd 7 e debt ~mount')
- **Recommendation**: Re-extract with OCR engine (e.g., Tesseract with higher resolution or ABBYY) to improve text fidelity.

### NAP-SRC-0007 (IMG_0304.jpeg)
- **Current extraction**: Tesseract OCR, confidence 0.65
- **Issues**: Low confidence, missing card reference and authorisation number
- **Recommendation**: Re-OCR with enhanced preprocessing (deskew, contrast adjustment) or use a different OCR engine.

### Next Steps
- Proposed follow-up task: targeted re-OCR with higher-quality engine.
- Validation gates: production_mapping, chain_of_custody.
proposed_artifacts.title: OCR Improvement Report for NAP-SRC-0005 and NAP-SRC-0007

proposed_tasks.instructions: Re-extract text from NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF) using a higher-quality OCR engine (e.g., Tesseract with improved settings or ABBYY). Re-OCR NAP-SRC-0007 (JPEG) with preprocessing (deskew, contrast adjustment) and a different OCR engine. Compare output with current extracted text and report improvements.
proposed_tasks.title: Re-OCR NAP-SRC-0005 and NAP-SRC-0007 with enhanced engine

risk_flags.description: Poor OCR in NAP-SRC-0005 may cause misinterpretation of guarantor obligations.
Low-confidence OCR in NAP-SRC-0007 may miss payment details.
Both sources are candidate trust status; chain of custody validation gate required.

summary: OCR improvement assessment for NAP-SRC-0005 (PDF extracted text, 85% confidence) and NAP-SRC-0007 (Tesseract OCR from JPEG, 65% confidence). NAP-SRC-0005 shows garbled characters, missing line breaks, and merged words; NAP-SRC-0007 has low confidence and possible missing text. Both sources are candidate trust status. No contradictions or redaction flags identified. Proposed follow-up task for targeted re-OCR with higher-quality engine.

uncertainties.reason: OCR quality for NAP-SRC-0005 is poor; garbled text may affect legal interpretation of guarantor obligations.
NAP-SRC-0007 OCR confidence is low; missing card reference and authorisation number may be due to image quality or redaction.
No authority or memory available to verify the legal effect of the garbled guarantor form text.
